summary.headline: ADM appoints Vikram Luthar as Chief Financial Officer, succeeding Ray G. Young.
summary.narrative_summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company announced the appointment of Vikram Luthar as Chief Financial Officer, effective immediately. Luthar succeeds Ray G. Young, who will continue as Vice Chairman and support the transition. Luthar has held various leadership roles at ADM, including Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer for Nutrition, and previously served as President of Health & Wellness and Bioactives businesses.

extraction_notes: The filing primarily reports on leadership changes with no financial numbers or guidance provided. The press release in Exhibit 99.1 contains the announcement details and quotes from the CEO.
